message:
feat(embed): add request_url() trait method for providers with query-param auth (Gemini)

Add request_url() default method to ApiProvider trait that returns
endpoint_url() by default. GeminiProvider overrides it to return
batch_embed_url() with API key query params. Fix doc comment on
endpoint_url to say "Base" instead of "Full".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
